title: CircuitOffice Pearl Inlain Triple Moon Soapstone Mortar and Pestle Set, 3" x 3" Size
description:
About this item
Solid Soapstone with Pearl Inlaid Trible Moon
3" Tall
3" Diameter
1 1/2" Interior Depth
reviews_5s: The only thing I will say is that the stone is a completely different color. But it is a beautiful item. Very sturdy.The color is slightly different in person, but this was a positive as I like it even more than the one pictured above. It is the perfect size for grinding herbs in small amounts. I have recieved lots of compliments from those who have seen it on my altar.Heavy, durable, grinds smoothly, little mess.. only not as colorful as the one picturedBeautiful and exactuly as pictured. I've placed it on my altar. The company ships when promised and the items are well packaged.Small, but that was expected. I didn't expect to like the smallness so much though. It grinds the perfect amount, and then because of the shape/size, it pours easily.Love it thanks so much!!!Beautiful product. As a gift for my daughter, she is very happy with it.On the small size but perfect for beginners.
reviews_1s: I received this product but it was broke. That is really not the issue cause it can be replaced but the COLOR was absolutely WRONG
